bullets: Officially licensed Mario Kart collectible statue — Collector's Edition
Expanded base with LED light-up function creating a brilliant white finish line effect
Pose depicts Mario speeding across the finish line
Limited edition numbering on the bottom of the base and packaging
High-quality PVC with rechargeable battery and USB-C cable included
content.description: The Collector’s Edition of this statue has an expanded base with LED light-up function. The base’s design makes it appear as if Mario is speeding across the finish line! Long lights all around the base glow a brilliant white when activated.

attributes.whats_in_box:
• Exquisitely detailed PVC statue of Mario
• Pose inspired by video game
• Round black base with finishing line and race track details
• LED function for the base (Static Mode only)
• Limited edition numbering on the bottom of the base and packaging
• Rechargeable battery with USB-C Cable
• Special Premium deluxe box packaging
